title: 311 CITY AND COUNTY INFORMATION AND REFERRAL - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND 311 CITY AND COUNTY INFORMATION AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Information and referral services to all City of Portland Bureaus, Multnomah County Departments, and other local government services. Also provides information about disability rights and resolves issues about ADA accessibility for the City of Portland. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 114 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone or email: 7 days per week 7am-8pm (closed for federal holidays) Email (503) 823-4000 311 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 823-4000 or 311 City/County Information and Referral Main phone 311 Multnomah County Only Pothole Hotline (503) 823-1700 Alternate (503) 823-4120 Mayor's Office Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Romanian, Tagalog, and interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland and Multnomah County Services: 311 Services City/Town Council Offices Disability Rights Groups Mayors Offices Public Nuisance Reporting * Homelessness Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues Street Maintenance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OFFICE OF COMMUNITY AND CIVIC LIFE HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS AND URBAN CAMPING IMPACT REDUCTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CITY OF PORTLAND STREET OUTREACH REQUEST PROGRAM LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - ONE POINT OF CONTACT UNSANCTIONED CAMPSITE REPORTING LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - ROSE CITY SELF DEFENSE MATERIAL GOODS - COOLING PORTLAND PCEF-FUNDED CLIMATE RESILIENCE PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - HOME REUNIFICATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND
